sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64798" key="malako/fqalmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰλᾰκόφθαλμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64798.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soft-eyed</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0329.tlg001:6:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodect.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
